data.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
data.description: <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/Full_Stack.max-600x600.format-webp.webp">A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
data.author: <name>Molly McHugh-Johnson</name><title>Contributor</title><department/><company/>
